AcceptAccountLinkInvitation.description: Grants permission to accept invitations from other AWS accounts to share the same configuration for WorkSpaces BYOL

AssociateConnectionAlias.description: Grants permission to associate connection aliases with directories

AssociateIpGroups.description: Grants permission to associate IP access control groups with directories

AssociateWorkspaceApplication.description: Grants permission to associate a workspace application with a WorkSpace

AuthorizeIpRules.description: Grants permission to add rules to IP access control groups

CopyWorkspaceImage.description: Grants permission to copy a WorkSpace image

CreateAccountLinkInvitation.description: Grants permission to invite other AWS accounts to share the same configuration for WorkSpaces BYOL

CreateConnectClientAddIn.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon Connect client add-in within a directory

CreateConnectionAlias.description: Grants permission to create connection aliases for use with cross-Region redirection

CreateIpGroup.description: Grants permission to create IP access control groups

CreateRootClientCertificate.description: Grants permission to create a root client certificate

CreateStandbyWorkspaces.description: Grants permission to create one or more Standby WorkSpaces

CreateTags.description: Grants permission to create tags for WorkSpaces resources

CreateUpdatedWorkspaceImage.description: Grants permission to create an updated WorkSpace image

CreateWorkspaceBundle.description: Grants permission to create a WorkSpace bundle

CreateWorkspaceImage.description: Grants permission to create a new WorkSpace image

CreateWorkspaces.description: Grants permission to create one or more WorkSpaces

CreateWorkspacesPool.description: Grants permission to create a WorkSpaces Pool

DeleteAccountLinkInvitation.description: Grants permission to delete invitations to other AWS accounts to share the same configuration for WorkSpaces BYOL

DeleteClientBranding.description: Grants permission to delete AWS WorkSpaces Client branding data within a directory

DeleteConnectClientAddIn.description: Grants permission to delete an Amazon Connect client add-in that is configured within a directory

DeleteConnectionAlias.description: Grants permission to delete connection aliases

DeleteIpGroup.description: Grants permission to delete IP access control groups

DeleteRootClientCertificate.description: Grants permission to delete root client certificate

DeleteTags.description: Grants permission to delete tags from WorkSpaces resources

DeleteWorkspaceBundle.description: Grants permission to delete WorkSpace bundles

DeleteWorkspaceImage.description: Grants permission to delete WorkSpace images

DeployWorkspaceApplications.description: Grants permission to deploy all pending workspace applications on a WorkSpace

DeregisterWorkspaceDirectory.description: Grants permission to deregister directories from use with Amazon WorkSpaces

DescribeAccount.description: Grants permission to retrieve the configuration of Bring Your Own License (BYOL) for WorkSpaces accounts

DescribeAccountModifications.description: Grants permission to retrieve modifications to the configuration of Bring Your Own License (BYOL) for WorkSpaces accounts

DescribeApplicationAssociations.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about resources associated with a WorkSpace application

DescribeApplications.description: Grants permission to obtain information about WorkSpace applications

DescribeBundleAssociations.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about resources associated with a WorkSpace bundle

DescribeClientBranding.description: Grants permission to retrieve AWS WorkSpaces Client branding data within a directory

DescribeClientProperties.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about WorkSpaces clients

DescribeConnectClientAddIns.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of Amazon Connect client add-ins that have been created

DescribeConnectionAliasPermissions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the permissions that the owners of connection aliases have granted to other AWS accounts for connection aliases

DescribeConnectionAliases.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list that describes the connection aliases used for cross-Region redirection

DescribeConsent.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about consent agreement to BYOL minimum requirements

DescribeCustomWorkspaceImageImport.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about WorkSpace BYOL image import task

DescribeImageAssociations.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about resources associated with a WorkSpace image

DescribeIpGroups.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about IP access control groups

DescribeTags.description: Grants permission to describe the tags for WorkSpaces resources

DescribeWorkspaceAssociations.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about resources associated with a WorkSpace

DescribeWorkspaceBundles.description: Grants permission to obtain information about WorkSpace bundles

DescribeWorkspaceDirectories.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about directories that are registered with WorkSpaces

DescribeWorkspaceImagePermissions.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about WorkSpace image permissions

DescribeWorkspaceImages.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about WorkSpace images

DescribeWorkspaceSnapshots.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about WorkSpace snapshots

DescribeWorkspaces.description: Grants permission to obtain information about WorkSpaces

DescribeWorkspacesConnectionStatus.description: Grants permission to obtain the connection status of WorkSpaces

DescribeWorkspacesPoolSessions.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the sessions of a WorkSpaces Pool

DescribeWorkspacesPools.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about WorkSpaces Pools

DirectoryAccessManagement.description: Grants permission to directory management actions while managing and provisioning workspaces

DisassociateConnectionAlias.description: Grants permission to disassociate connection aliases from directories

DisassociateIpGroups.description: Grants permission to disassociate IP access control groups from directories

DisassociateWorkspaceApplication.description: Grants permission to disassociate a workspace application from a WorkSpace

GetAccountLink.description: Grants permission to retrieve a link with another AWS Account for sharing configuration for WorkSpaces BYOL

ImportClientBranding.description: Grants permission to import AWS WorkSpaces Client branding data within a directory

ImportCustomWorkspaceImage.description: Grants permission to import Bring Your Own License (BYOL) images into Amazon WorkSpaces

ImportWorkspaceImage.description: Grants permission to import Bring Your Own License (BYOL) images into Amazon WorkSpaces

ListAccountLinks.description: Grants permission to retrieve links with the AWS Account(s) that share your configuration for WorkSpaces BYOL

ListAvailableManagementCidrRanges.description: Grants permission to list the available CIDR ranges for enabling Bring Your Own License (BYOL) for WorkSpaces accounts

ModifyAccount.description: Grants permission to modify the configuration of Bring Your Own License (BYOL) for WorkSpaces accounts

ModifyCertificateBasedAuthProperties.description: Grants permission to modify the certificate-based authorization properties of a directory

ModifyClientProperties.description: Grants permission to modify the properties of WorkSpaces clients

ModifyEndpointEncryptionMode.description: Grants permission to configure the specified directory between Standard TLS and FIPS 140-2 validated mode

ModifySamlProperties.description: Grants permission to modify the SAML properties of a directory

ModifySelfservicePermissions.description: Grants permission to modify the self-service WorkSpace management capabilities for your users

ModifyStreamingProperties.description: Grants permission to modify the streaming properties

ModifyWorkspaceAccessProperties.description: Grants permission to specify which devices and operating systems users can use to access their WorkSpaces

ModifyWorkspaceCreationProperties.description: Grants permission to modify the default properties used to create WorkSpaces

ModifyWorkspaceProperties.description: Grants permission to modify WorkSpace properties, including the running mode and the AutoStop period

ModifyWorkspaceState.description: Grants permission to modify the state of WorkSpaces

RegisterWorkspaceDirectory.description: Grants permission to register directories for use with Amazon WorkSpaces

RejectAccountLinkInvitation.description: Grants permission to reject invitations from other AWS accounts to share the same configuration for WorkSpaces BYOL

RevokeIpRules.description: Grants permission to remove rules from IP access control groups

StartWorkspaces.description: Grants permission to start AutoStop WorkSpaces

StartWorkspacesPool.description: Grants permission to start a WorkSpaces Pool

StopWorkspaces.description: Grants permission to stop AutoStop WorkSpaces

StopWorkspacesPool.description: Grants permission to stop a WorkSpaces Pool

Stream.description: Grants permission to federated users to sign in by using their existing credentials and stream their workspace

TerminateWorkspacesPool.description: Grants permission to terminate a WorkSpaces Pool

TerminateWorkspacesPoolSession.description: Grants permission to terminate a WorkSpaces Pool session

UpdateConnectClientAddIn.description: Grants permission to update an Amazon Connect client add-in. Use this action to update the name and endpoint URL of an Amazon Connect client add-in

UpdateConnectionAliasPermission.description: Grants permission to share or unshare connection aliases with other accounts

UpdateConsent.description: Grants permission to update the consent agreement to BYOL minimum requirements

UpdateRootClientCertificate.description: Grants permission to update a root client certificate

UpdateRulesOfIpGroup.description: Grants permission to replace rules for IP access control groups

UpdateWorkspaceBundle.description: Grants permission to update the WorkSpace images used in WorkSpace bundles

UpdateWorkspaceImagePermission.description: Grants permission to share or unshare WorkSpace images with other accounts by specifying whether other accounts have permission to copy the image

UpdateWorkspacesPool.description: Grants permission to update the WorkSpaces pool

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access based on the tag keys that are passed in the request

workspaces:userId.description: Filters access by the ID of the Workspaces user
